title: joniris biglumis
side_effects: Joniris biglumis can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can also lead to liver damage, skin irritation, and increased heart rate. In extreme cases, improper use of joniris biglumis can cause respiratory failure, seizures, and even death. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potentially life-threatening side effects.
